text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: One day, as I'm walking by the<n>academy shop...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Brrr... I'm so cold...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Enough of your whining, Doto.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Have a glance at what lies behind us!<n>There are
still a hundred packs of ice<n>cream to get through!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: O-okay... I'll do what I can to eat<n>them...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
What in the?! There's no reason to<n>eat them all!
Are you trying to clear<n>out the ice cream shelves
or<n>something?!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Wah, Fukukitaru? B-but...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
We won't get the special prize if we<n>don't eat all
the ice cream bars...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Special prize?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Yes. Whoever finds the winning stick<n>will win the
special prize—a Super<n>Snug Carrot Blanket.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
It's a first-rate item that does away<n>with all your
aches and fatigue in a<n>single day's re—

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Urgh?!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: King?!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
...I am bowing out from the mission<n>temporarily!
This is not me admitting<n>defeat, mind y—

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Urk... Urrrghhh!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: KIIIIING?!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Uuugh... What to do now? No... I need<n>to keep
eating...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Riddle me this, Doto. What if... and this<n>is purely
hypothetical...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
What if you eat a hundred and don't<n>find the
winning stick? Wouldn't it be<n>better to stop while
you can?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
If that were to happen... actually, if it<n>does
happen—we'd just go to<n>another shop to buy
more.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I may be useless, but if I find that<n>winning stick...
I could, just maybe,<n>achieve anything I want.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I don't... want to be this way forever.<n>Bad at
everything...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I want to learn to love myself and<n>become an
Umamusume who can<n>give it her all!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: ...I see. So you're making a prayer of<n>sorts.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Then our meeting today must be the<n>work of
fate! I shall supply you with a<n>pile of lucky
charms to help you find a<n>winning ice cream
stick!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: F-Fukukitaru!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
No problem! I'll go to the classroom<n>and get
everything to you in a jiffy!<n>I've even got my
prized lucky<n>charm—a winning ice cream stick
that<n>I got ten years ago!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Oh, uh... Th-thank you very much?

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
And with that, Meisho Doto continues<n>to eat her
ice cream bars as<n>Matikanefukukitaru cheers her
on.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
They would probably get through the<n>ice cream
bars a lot quicker together,<n>but I choose not to
interfere. That's<n>when...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: I-I... I found it!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Meisho Doto successfully wins the<n>Super Snug
Carrot Blanket and puts it<n>straight to use the
following day.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
...Recovering from excessive<n>consumption of ice
cream.
